5 Prong Spring Loaded Jewelry Repair Tool Pen Style Arts and Crafts - 4.5 inch

This 4.5" 5 Prong Pick-Up Tool is great for any craft or hobby using small, hard to handle pieces. The prongs extend so you can securely hold small or large crafting objects. No need to worry about dropping small valuables!

Key Features

  • 5 PRONG DESIGN - provides a secure grip on small or large crafting objects.
  • COMPACT SIZE - makes it easy to handle and store.
  • IDEAL FOR CRAFTS AND HOBBIES - like beading, jewelry repair, and model making.
  • PREVENTS DROPPING OR LOSING SMALL PARTS - reducing frustration and waste.
  • PERFECT TOOL FOR PRECISION WORK - involving tiny, hard-to-hold pieces.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 5PPUT-244
  • UPC: 706569866803
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 4.5 in

Whether you are beading, making figurines, or enjoying your favorite hobby, this pick-up tool will aid in any small piece project! Be sure to have this tool handy during your next jewelry repair or crafting project.
